description: User dwells on the screen with the cursor positioned over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
frame_description: The user is viewing the main session screen with a prompt and two interactive buttons at the bottom.

description: User clicks the 'Repeat the task instructions' button, initiating a UI transition.
The UI state changes significantly, first zooming in on the button and then shifting it to the right edge of the screen as the system processes the request.
frame_description: The screen content undergoes a zoom and translation animation, moving the focus of the interface.
